---
name: Feature request
about: Use this template to suggest a feature
title: ''
labels: type:feature

---

**Is your feature request related to a recognition challenge? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the challenge or limitation you are facing in the project.

**Describe the solution you would like**
A clear and concise description of the enhancements or functionality you would like to add to the project.

**Describe alternatives you have considered**
Provide insights into any other methods, algorithms, or tools you have thought of that might address the challenge or limitation.

**Additional context**
Include any other context, screenshots, external references, or sample code that can provide more clarity about the feature request.
